LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsCap.description: A distinguished peaked cap with a stiff brim, adorned with embroidered insignia and a gilded band. While it offers little physical protection, its commanding design enhances the wearer's presence, greatly improving negotiation ability.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsCap.label: general’s cap
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsInsignia.descriptio: Decorative galten epaulettes adorned with braided aiguillette cord and a polished ceremonial clasp. Once worn by high-ranking officers, these insignia instill a sense of duty and composure, making the wearer less prone to mental breaks.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_GeneralsInsignia.label: general's insignia
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_MilitaryCoat.description: A heavy military coat designed for harsh conditions, offering protection from calt, wind, and debris on the battlefield. Makes the wearer more confident. Since the coat has been mass-produced, individual items do not vary in quality at all.
LanguageData.VQED_Apparel_MilitaryCoat.label: military coat
